lines: Morocco are absolutely fucking flying — 4-2 over Haiti puts them joint top of Group C on 7 points, which means Callum, Butters, Jim, and Wilmot are all smugly sipping their drinks while the rest of you rot.

Ellis is having a proper nightmare — South Korea just got spanked 1-0 by South Africa, and her Paraguay side sit 3rd in Group D with a game today against Australia that they basically cannot afford to lose. Rough.
The Foreman is walking a tightrope of absolute mediocrity — Türkiye haven't won a single game yet and face the USA today, who've won both of theirs. Oh, and Curaçao are also his. Curaçao. Imagine.

Jim's Qatar are officially on life support with just 1 point, but at least Bosnia and Herzegovina — owned by Dene, the sweepstake's resident basement dweller — gave them a proper shoeing to twist the knife.

One to watch today: Tunisia vs Netherlands in Group F — Al desperately needs the Dutch to win and keep pace at the top, while Callum and Dene need Tunisia to finally get off zero points. Something's got to give, and someone's going home miserable.
